side_effects.description: Diagnosed with aggressive breast and ovarian cancer; OP speculates BPC-157 may have contributed to rapid tumor growth due to angiogenesis, though acknowledges no definitive causal link

protocol_notes: Two courses of BPC-157 over two years, oral administration. OP follows whole foods, low carb, intermittent fasting diet. No family history of breast or ovarian cancer. OP clarified she does not definitively claim BPC-157 caused cancer but suspects it may have accelerated aggressive tumor growth via angiogenesis. Genetic workup planned.
